description: Style Note These stylish shoes are all the rage among Hollywood A-listers, don't be too late to join the trend! The comfort of flats with the added style of mini-heels, this pair from senorita is a season must-have. Product Details Round toed black slip on shoes with a small heel Leather upper, has reinforced overlay at the heel collar, cut out details around the toe box and elasticated gussets at the side of the tongue Soft footbed Upper adhered to the outsole TPU textured outsole Comes with a shoe bag Material and Care Leather Use a leather conditioner to clean and protect leather
